articles.title: 'Packed to the brim': Trump says 45K guests attend Great American State Fair rally - WJAR
articles.description: President Donald Trump touted what he described as a crowd of at least 45,000 people at the Great American State Fair rally in Washington, D.C.
articles.content: WASHINGTON (TNND) President Donald Trump touted what he described as a crowd of at least 45,000 people at his Great American State Fair rally in Washington, D.C. earlier this week, while also urging … [+1473 chars]

articles.title: Israel’s Vance problem is bigger than JD Vance - Politico
articles.description: Vice President JD Vance has become the face of a Washington that no longer treats Israel  as the exception to "America First."
articles.content:
Israel had expected when President Donald Trump came into office that his America First foreign policy would include an exception for Israel, said an Israeli political adviser.

articles.title: US allows partial release of Anthropic's Mythos AI model - DW.com
articles.description: Only a small group of American firms will get access to Anthropic's AI Model Mythos 5, however, it is unclear which companies will be selected.
articles.content: The United States government has authorized Anthropic to release its powerful Claude Mythos 5, an artificial intelligence model, to some "trusted" American cybersecurity firms, the company announced … [+2052 chars]
